---
title: "Awards & Honors"
subtitle: "Recognitions, Scholarships, and Distinctions"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---

{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

## 2026

- **Outstanding Graduate Student in Teaching** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Departmental recognition for excellence in undergraduate instruction.
- **Teaching Statistical Thinking with GAISE Workshop Travel Award** — *NSF-Funded EAPOST Program*  
  Support to attend a workshop on evidence-based statistics pedagogy.
- **NISS Writing Workshop for Junior Researchers Travel Award** — *National Institute of Statistical Sciences*  
  Selected for a national scientific-writing workshop for early-career researchers.
- **Statistics in Pharmaceuticals (SIP) Travel Scholarship** — *University of Connecticut*  
  Travel support to attend and present at the SIP conference.
- **PharmaSUG Student Scholarship** — *Pharmaceutical Industry SAS® Users Group*  
  Student award supporting participation in the PharmaSUG conference.
- **Student Research Grant** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Funded research dissemination at national meetings.
- **SSPA Conference Grant** — *ASA Section for Statistical Programmers & Analysts*  
  Travel grant for the Joint Statistical Meetings.
- **JSM Early Career Travel Award** — *American Statistical Association*  
  Support to attend and present at the 2026 Joint Statistical Meetings in Boston, MA.
- **African American Conference Assistance Award** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Travel support to attend conferences.

## 2025

- **Lester R. Curtin Award** — *American Statistical Association*  
  Awarded to a promising student in statistics within the government and public-health community.
- **JSM Early Career Travel Award** — *American Statistical Association*  
  Support to attend the 2025 Joint Statistical Meetings.
- **SSPA Conference Grant** — *ASA Section for Statistical Programmers & Analysts*  
  Travel grant for JSM 2025.
- **Symposium on Data Science and Statistics Travel Award** — *American Statistical Association*  
  Travel grant for SDSS 2025.
- **Diversity Mentorship Program Award** — *American Statistical Association*  
  Funded participation in the ASA Diversity Mentorship Program
- **Student Research Grant** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Support for original research and its dissemination.
- **Professional Development Grant** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Supported participation in national statistical training workshops.
- **Graduate Community Mentoring Scholarship** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Awarded for academic promise and engagement in UNM's graduate mentoring community
- **South Central Topology IV Travel Award** — *Texas A&M University*  
  Travel support to participate in the South Central Topology conference.
- **Golden Key International Honour Society** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Recognized for placement among the top 15% of UNM graduates for academic excellence.

## 2024

- **Graduate Scholarship of Teaching and Learning** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Recognized for excellence in pedagogical research and evidence-based teaching.
- **Project for New Mexico Graduates of Color Scholarship** — *University of New Mexico*  
  Honored for mentorship, peer development, and graduate preparation initiatives.

## 2023

- **Best Teaching Assistant Award** — *Department of Statistics & Actuarial Science, University of Ghana*  
  Selected as top-performing TA among 20+ departmental teaching assistants.

## 2022

- **Honor of Excellence and Dedication** — *University of Ghana Actuarial and Statistics Society*  
  Recognized for two years of leadership as Academic Committee President.
- **Most Hardworking Committee Executive** — *University of Ghana Actuarial and Statistics Society*  
  For pioneering the society's peer-tutoring and professional development initiatives.
